If you want, quitting is easy.

Detoxification treatment completely nullifying the addictive effect of nicotine and tobacco toxins.

A single session, of one hour

You just have to want it

success rate!

95%

Bio-Resonance Treatment

The application of bio-resonance to quit smoking is based on the physical principle that the body (its cells) is permeated by tobacco smoke and thus «memorizes» and retains the electromagnetic frequencies of the toxic substances it has consumed, such as nicotine, tar, and other cigarette additives. Our treatment helps the organism to neutralize and eliminate these toxic frequencies, facilitating detoxification and removing the memory and information of the substances, allowing the patient to quit smoking.

Fast and effective efficiency

Our experience confirms that a single session eliminates tobacco dependence, making it the best option for those seeking results.

No side effects

The treatment consists of eliminating only the tobacco frequencies, without chemical substances or altering your organism. Therefore, it lacks contraindications.

Complete detoxification

It eliminates not only nicotine but also all chemical toxins from cigarettes, promoting a deep cleansing of the organism.

Improved wellbeing

Detoxifying the organism helps to experience greater energy, better breathing, and a recovery of your health.

Doctor Enrique Fernández

Through my personal experience and after having helped very many people quit smoking for more than 41 years, I would say that quitting smoking comes down to a single decision:

Do I want to quit smoking or not?

Willpower is not necessary.

It is essential to desire / want to quit smoking.

There is a big difference between wanting to quit and having to quit smoking. Many people have to quit smoking due to medical prescription or because their family asks them to. However, if to the obligation to quit smoking you add the desire to quit smoking, the latter considerably boosts the treatment.

ADVANCED FREQUENCY TREATMENT

Everything that EXISTS possesses and emits a unique frequency and wavelength, like a fingerprint.

Every FREQUENCY is vibrational information.

Every VIBRATION – INFORMATION is susceptible to being modified.

What should you know?

The treatment to quit smoking is simple. A single one-hour session is enough to break free from tobacco addiction, with no need for willpower. Only the genuine desire to quit is required.

We use a treatment based on electromagnetic bio-frequencies, which allows the elimination of the information of nicotine and all substances present in tobacco (tars, cadmium, lead, arsenic, ammonia, benzenes, among others). By inverting these frequencies in the body, we manage to neutralize their effects.

Why does the withdrawal syndrome not occur?

When you smoke, tobacco smoke permeates every cell in your body, leaving a mark in the form of electromagnetic frequencies. Even if you quit smoking on your own, this information remains and continues to negatively affect your organism.

Only through an electromagnetic elimination of these frequencies is it possible to completely cancel the information associated with tobacco, whether from cigarettes, cigars, pipe tobacco, or vapes. The result is an organism as if you had never smoked. While previous lesions caused by tobacco may still be present, your health status will noticeably improve and you will have the capacity to recover to the greatest extent possible.

Professional in charge

The treatment is performed by Ms. Miriam Matía, a psychologist specialized in Homeopathy, with a high qualification and experience in this type of therapy for over 20 years. If necessary, the treatment can be complemented with Homeopathic medicine.

The bio-frequency-based treatment harmonizes your body and eliminates the tobacco information at the same time

Healthy Signal (Harmonic)

Tobacco and other toxins Signal (Disharmonic)

Inverted Signal (of tobacco)

Therapeutic Output (Cancellation and Amplification)

frequently asked questions

What should I do after the treatment?

It is important to drink plenty of water during the following days after the treatment so your body releases accumulated toxins more easily. In the years I have been doing the anti-tobacco treatment, I have never modified the patients' habits. They can continue drinking coffee, going out at night, or any other activity they did when they smoked. At approximately 4-7 days of the treatment, the habits fade and even most patients don't even remember tobacco.

How is anxiety managed? Do you gain weight afterward?

Do you have Anxiety? And does tobacco calm you down? What will happen when you quit smoking?
If there is a baseline anxiety that is calmed with tobacco, when removing the habit of smoking one might continue with that anxiety and the tendency might be to substitute tobacco for food. Homeopathic Medicine helps a lot in these cases, so the fear of gaining weight situation should not prevent you from taking your anti-tobacco treatment.

Gaining weight? Many people are concerned about gaining weight upon quitting smoking. There is no physiological correlation between quitting smoking and gaining weight.

And the remaining 5%?

We find that in 5% of cases people come obliged by their relatives or without knowing if they truly want to quit smoking. Given that the treatment works, it is important that you come to the consultation wanting to quit smoking. By eliminating physical and psychological dependence, it will be easy for you to stay without smoking since your body will not ask you to smoke.

Locations of the consultations

La Herradura (Granada)

Paseo Andrés Segovia nº 35, 1ºC 18697 La Herradura. Located one hour away from the Malaga airport.

Bilbao

Albia Building, San Vicente Street. SPANPKOR Business Center - Sixth Floor.

International Consultation

We recommend you contact us well in advance. We will provide you with a reliable taxi from Malaga Airport to La Herradura. Hotel option available.

“Before curing anyone, ask him if he is willing to give up the things that made him sick.”

— Hippocrates

“Health depends on being in harmony with our souls.”

— Edward Bach

“Medicine must integrate body, soul and spirit so that the treatment is true and lasting.”

— Rudolf Steiner

“The true doctor not only prescribes, but listens, understands and guides towards balance.”

— Anonymous

“Homeopathy does not treat diseases, but people who are sick.”

— André Saine

“The body whispers before it screams; the attentive doctor listens to the silence of the disease before it manifests.”

— Proposed Quote

“Technology heals, chemistry acts, but the soul is cured in the presence of love and listening.”

— Proposed Quote

“The physician's high and only mission is to restore the sick to health, to cure, as it is termed.”

— Samuel Hahnemann

“The good physician treats the disease; the great physician treats the patient who has the disease.”

— William Osler
